MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-03-2007 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-04-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant David Sher's Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to respond on May 7, 2007. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $200, to be paid within 10 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
